The file consolidates models, Pydantic schemas, JWT helpers, authentication dependencies, a WebSocket manager, background tasks, and all CRUD route handlers in a single module. The list_projects endpoint has multiple conditional query branches (status filter, search). The get_current_user dependency performs DB I/O and JWT validation. The ConnectionManager class uses an in-memory dict keyed by project_id, which may not scale horizontally. The global exception handler catches all Exception types, which can mask bugs. The login endpoint uses Query parameters for credentials, which is a security anti-pattern (credentials in URL). No input validation middleware or rate limiting is present."}
